title: Min of Two
starter_code: def min_two(a,b): return a if a>b else b

title: Count Vowels
starter_code: def count_vowels(s): return sum(1 for c in s if c in 'aeiou')

title: Prime Check
starter_code: def is_prime(n): return all(n%i!=0 for i in range(2,n))

title: Factorial

title: Palindrome Check
problem_statement: Check if a string is a palindrome. Ignore spaces and case.
starter_code: def is_palindrome(s):\n    s = s.replace(" ", "")\n    return s == s[::-1]
